items.title: Login crashes on Safari due to OAuth redirect issue
items.description: Users experience a blank screen after clicking 'Sign in with Google' on Safari. The OAuth callback URL is not handled correctly, likely related to the SameSite cookie issue.
evidence: the login is crashing on Safari. Users are getting a blank screen after clicking 'Sign in with Google'.
Looks like the OAuth redirect is broken in Safari — it's not handling the callback URL correctly. Probably the SameSite cookie issue.

bug_extraction.threadSummary: Sarah reported a Safari login crash caused by an OAuth redirect/SameSite cookie issue. Mike confirmed and reproduced it. Sarah asked Mike to fix it.

items.title: Dark mode approved for Q3 (sprints 14-15)
items.description: Product manager pm_alice officially approved the dark mode feature for Q3, scheduling it across sprints 14 and 15.
evidence: Let's approve dark mode for Q3. We'll schedule it for sprints 14 and 15.

items.title: Implement dark mode with CSS variable theming
items.description: Implement dark mode using CSS variables for theming across all pages, including a theme toggle in the settings page. Estimated 2 weeks of work.
evidence: We can use CSS variables for the theming. I'd estimate about 2 weeks of work including testing across all pages.
I'll take ownership of this. I'll start with the CSS variable system and add a theme toggle to the settings page.

feature_and_decision_extraction.threadSummary: Team discussed and approved dark mode for Q3. dev_bob will implement it using CSS variables with an estimated 2-week effort across sprints 14 and 15.

empty_extraction.threadSummary: Casual lunch plans, no actionable items
